description_long: This convenience store features a two-story structure with a flat roof and a prominent overhanging awning above the main entrance. The facade includes a teal storefront with white signage and a large window, flanked by a smaller shop with a blue roof and a brown eatery with a red awning and open seating. The street-facing side is lined with modern street lamps and small green planters, while the sidewalk is wide and clean. The building's upper level is painted a pale cream color and has a single window with bars, suggesting a utilitarian design. The overall appearance is that of a compact, urban commercial block, typical of Japanese or East Asian cityscapes, with a mix of retail and dining establishments.
description: A compact, two-story convenience store with a teal awning, large window, and adjacent eateries, set along a street with modern lamps and planters.
description_view_0: The front view shows the teal awning, large window, storefront signage, and adjacent shops with street lamps and planters.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the overhanging awning, the blue-roofed shop, and the brown eatery with open seating.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the plain cream-colored back wall, barred window, and the backs of the adjacent shops.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the building's upper story, the overhanging awning, and the street layout with lamps and planters.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large white signage with stylized characters mounted above the teal awning, non-illuminated, spanning the width of the main storefront.
attribute_display_windows: One large display window on the main storefront, framed in teal, transparent, with no visible advertisements.
attribute_exterior_lighting_fixtures: Four modern pole-mounted street lamps along the sidewalk, brown in color, with boxy lamp heads.
